mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_data_source ( user_id, source_name, source_type, source_status, description ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{sourceName}, #{sourceType}, #{sourceStatus}, #{description} )
mapper.select: SELECT ds.source_id, ds.user_id, ds.source_name, ds.source_type, ds.source_status, ds.description, ds.last_sync_time, ds.created_time, ds.last_change_time, COALESCE(metric_stats.metric_count, 0) AS metric_count, COALESCE(task_stats.task_count, 0) AS task_count FROM t_data_source ds LEFT JOIN ( SELECT source_id, COUNT(*) AS metric_count FROM health_metric WHERE source_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY source_id ) metric_stats ON metric_stats.source_id = ds.source_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT source_id, COUNT(*) AS task_count FROM t_sync_task GROUP BY source_id ) task_stats ON task_stats.source_id = ds.source_id WHERE ds.source_id = #{sourceId} AND ds.user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1

SELECT ds.source_id, ds.user_id, ds.source_name, ds.source_type, ds.source_status, ds.description, ds.last_sync_time, ds.created_time, ds.last_change_time, COALESCE(metric_stats.metric_count, 0) AS metric_count, COALESCE(task_stats.task_count, 0) AS task_count FROM t_data_source ds LEFT JOIN ( SELECT source_id, COUNT(*) AS metric_count FROM health_metric WHERE source_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY source_id ) metric_stats ON metric_stats.source_id = ds.source_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT source_id, COUNT(*) AS task_count FROM t_sync_task GROUP BY source_id ) task_stats ON task_stats.source_id = ds.source_id WHERE ds.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY ds.last_sync_time DESC, ds.created_time DESC, ds.source_id DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_data_source WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND source_status = 0
